title: Year 7 Arts: Indigenous Perspectives Discussion
subject: Arts
learningObjectives: Develop deep understanding of arts concepts in cultural context
Apply traditional knowledge to modern arts challenges
Analyze environmental impacts through arts frameworks
Engage with community perspectives on arts issues
activities: Traditional knowledge workshop and arts integration
Community interview project on arts applications
Cultural artifact study through arts lens
resources: Cultural knowledge databases and arts resources
Traditional knowledge holders and arts experts
Environmental monitoring tools and arts software
Community engagement platforms and arts forums
Sustainability assessment frameworks and arts models
assessment: Indigenous perspectives integration in arts practice
nzcAlignment: Te Tiriti o Waitangi and its applications
